manifest.name: Emrald

manifest.author: xauravww
manifest.name: Encrypted Datasafe Notes
manifest.description: AES-encrypt markdown notes with lock/unlock vault, auto-lock timer, right-click encrypt/decrypt, corruption recovery, search decrypt, status bar indicator, file explorer decorations, and password change.

manifest.author: Eric N. Garcia
manifest.name: Encrypted Folders
manifest.description: Encrypt and decrypt entire folders within your vault with AES-256-GCM.

manifest.author: Miranda
manifest.name: 30-Day Energy Log
manifest.description: Track your energy levels and activities across 6 daily time slots for 30 days. Data is stored locally in your Vault. Supports Chinese and English.

manifest.author: Tzeng Yuxio
manifest.name: English Palette
manifest.description: Search commands in English within the Command Palette, regardless of your UI language.

manifest.author: Julio Gonzales

manifest.name: English Write Checker
manifest.description: Real-time English writing suggestions powered by a local LLM (Ollama) to reach C1-C2 level.

manifest.name: Engnese
manifest.description: input Chinese in English input method to avoid frequently input method switching

manifest.author: powen
manifest.name: EngramQuest
manifest.description: Turn notes into gamified Quest Maps, visual Memory Maps (Canvas), and flashcard Review Decks powered by AI Skills. Supports Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Cursor. Features FSRS spaced repetition, active recall, memory retention, and AI hints.

manifest.author: Rasbandit
manifest.name: Engram Vault Sync
manifest.description: Your notes are your AI's memory. Sync your vault, search by meaning, and let Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client read and write directly. Hosted or self-host free.

manifest.name: Enhanced Annotations
manifest.description: Add a sidebar view for comments and highlights.

manifest.author: RobertttBS
manifest.name: Enhanced Canvas
manifest.description: When creating links on Canvas, automatically add properties and Markdown links to notes. A command automatically creates canvas links based on Markdown links, and it adjusts all links to use the shortest path.

manifest.author: Mara-Li
manifest.name: Enhanced Copy
manifest.description: Copy your selection and add it some edit to paste in other markdown software. Allows to keep markdown in reading view, removing wikilinks in editing, copy from locked canvas, and more!

manifest.name: Enhanced Image
manifest.description: Enhance the experience of image seamlessly. For example, operations for image in context menu, command palette.
